content_text_en: Here is an example of how a production-grade Python code snippet looks when generated by the engine. Notice the IDE-style window and syntax coloring.
content_text_hi: यहां एक उदाहरण दिया गया है कि इंजन द्वारा उत्पन्न होने पर पायथन कोड कैसा दिखता है।
visual_content:
def fetch_embeddings(text):
    # Initialize Google GenAI Client
    client = genai.Client()
    response = client.models.embed_content(
        model='text-embedding-004',
        contents=text
    )
    return response.embeddings
narration_text_en: This is a demonstration of the code snippet visual type. The code is rendered in a realistic, dark-mode IDE window to keep the audience engaged.
